assessment: BELOW FLOOR: 62.3% < 65% floor. Train/val gap=27.4pp. Root cause: 552 params/training-img with features[14:] unfreeze on 3,080 samples. Round 3 fixes: dropout 0.4, features[16:] (~401 params/img), backbone lr=1e-5 separate from head lr=1e-4, differential AdamW, stronger augmentation. Realistic Round 3 target: 68-74% (76-83% requires 300-400 samples/class or stronger backbone).
artifact_note: Stale fast_mode artifact (56.5%, 9ep, fast_mode=True) replaced with confirmed Colab Round 2 values (62.3%, 23ep, fast_mode=False). Phase 1 scheduler: CosineAnnealingLR per local notebook state at time of run.
param_count_note: features[16] verified at ~320K (expand 155.5K + depthwise 10.6K + project 153.9K). An intermediate audit pass incorrectly computed 164K by omitting the expand conv. features[16:]+classifier total: ~1.23M / 3080 = ~401 params/img. Always verify with runtime sum().
